message:
Fix Buffer shim import to use explicit property access with error handling

- extensions_js.rs: Change node:buffer import from destructuring
  ({ Buffer }) to explicit property access (mod.Buffer), fixing
  compatibility with QuickJS module resolution edge cases where
  named exports from CJS-shimmed modules may not destructure correctly.
- Add .catch() handler to the Buffer test promise chain to capture
  and surface import errors via globalThis.bufResults.error instead
  of silently swallowing them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
